stories.text: As a project manager, I want to view projects for each department in the general projects overview

json.text: As a project manager, I want to view projects for each department in the general projects overview

means.text: view projects for each department in the general projects overview

stories.text: As a project manager, I want to create new projects so that planning and collaboration can be centered around a specific goal

json.text: As a project manager, I want to create new projects so that planning and collaboration can be centered around a specific goal

means.text: create new projects

ends.text: planning and collaboration can be centered around a specific goal
